hypothesis: Integrating ensemble-based uncertainty estimation into the ML-SSNEB workflow to adaptively balance ML and DFT evaluations will reproduce full-DFT SSNEB minimum energy pathways within 0.05 eV per formula unit across CsPbI3, TiO2, and at least one additional polymorphic solid under varied pressure–temperature conditions, while achieving at least a 2x reduction in total DFT calls.
